query:
CREATE TABLE `articles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`contentEn` text,
	`contentAr` text,
	`excerptEn` text,
	`excerptAr` text,
	`authorId` int,
	`sectionId` int,
	`featuredImageUrl` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`crossTopicMatrix` json,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`publishedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `articles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `articles_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `books` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`authorEn` varchar(255),
	`authorAr` varchar(255),
	`publisherEn` varchar(255),
	`publisherAr` varchar(255),
	`publishedYear` int,
	`sectionId` int,
	`coverImageUrl` text,
	`downloadUrl` text,
	`externalLink` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `books_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `books_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `contentLinks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`sourceType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`sourceId` int NOT NULL,
	`targetType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`targetId` int NOT NULL,
	`relationshipType` varchar(50),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `contentLinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `courses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`instructorId` int,
	`sectionId` int,
	`level` varchar(50),
	`duration` varchar(50),
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`syllabus` json,
	`learningOutcomes` json,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`enrollmentUrl` text,
	`maxEnrollments` int,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `courses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `courses_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `processes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`stepsEn` json,
	`stepsAr` json,
	`sectionId` int,
	`authorId` int,
	`diagramUrl` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `processes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `processes_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `reports` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`contentEn` text,
	`contentAr` text,
	`authorId` int,
	`sectionId` int,
	`fileUrl` text,
	`coverImageUrl` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`requiresAuth` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`publishedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `reports_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `reports_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `sections` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`iconUrl` text,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isCommerceGateway` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`externalLinks` json,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `sections_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `sections_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `techniques` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`applicationEn` text,
	`applicationAr` text,
	`sectionId` int,
	`authorId` int,
	`visualGuideUrl` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`relatedProcessIds` json,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `techniques_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `techniques_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

CREATE TABLE `tools` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`toolType` varchar(50),
	`sectionId` int,
	`authorId` int,
	`downloadUrl` text,
	`externalLink` text,
	`previewImageUrl` text,
	`scientificTags` json,
	`trustMetadata` json,
	`requiresAuth` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tools_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `tools_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
)
